queries.query: we inherited a service with ~5000 unit tests and nobody trusts them. can you review the unit suite and tell me which ones actually catch bugs vs which are theater? score it if you can
these tests pass locally every time but fail like 1 in 5 runs in CI. it's always the integration ones that touch the queue. help me triage before we just bump the retry count again
our playwright e2e test for the checkout flow keeps timing out intermittently on the 'place order' button. is this a flake or a real bug? what do i look at first?
review our snapshot tests — i think half of them are just locking in whatever the component rendered last and nobody actually reads the diffs anymore
we have a property-based test that's been shrinking to some weird empty-string counterexample and i can't tell if the property is wrong or the code is. triage it
our consumer contract test against the payments provider started failing after they shipped a minor version. is our pact too strict or did they break the contract?
audit our integration tests — i suspect a lot of them are really unit tests with mocks, or they're asserting on call counts instead of behavior. what's the false-pass risk here?
this perf test for the report endpoint is super noisy — sometimes 200ms, sometimes 2s, and it fails the build at random. triage whether it's the test or the system
we ran mutation testing and there are 40 surviving mutants in the billing module. review what that tells us about the test suite there
review our exploratory testing notes from last sprint — the charters were vague and the session reports don't have anything actionable in them
verify whether TEST-unit-002 is actually fixed using docs/audits/test-audit-workflow-state-2026-05-20-unit.json and this PR diff
do a quick credibility pass on this one test file — are the names behavior-describing, is it AAA, does it assert on implementation details?
this test passes even when i comment out the entire function body it's supposed to be testing. that can't be right — what's going on?
write the tests for our new payment-flow feature — which layers should we cover and what oracle do we use for the e2e bit?
our e2e suite takes 45 minutes and the team just skips it. which tests should we delete and which do we keep?
it's our quarterly test-pyramid review — where should we invest next quarter and where should we disinvest across unit/integration/e2e?
design a test strategy for a new microservice we're spinning up — what to test at which layer as a portfolio
the production reporting query is slow at 2pm every day, help me trace what's saturating the db. postgres 14 with pgbouncer
our cli's --help output is dense and new joiners can't tell --region from --zone. review the help layout for developer experience
explain how property-based testing and shrinking work — i'm writing a one-pager for the team
refactor this typescript function to use early returns instead of nested if statements
